name: Golden Grace Wedding Cake
description: An exquisite multi-tier masterpiece finished with smooth ivory cream, hand-painted antique gold details, and fresh blush roses. Perfect for a luxurious celebration.

name: Belgian Chocolate Truffle
description: Rich Belgian dark chocolate ganache layered between moist chocolate sponge, decorated with sleek chocolate curls and hints of luxury gold leaf.

name: Whimsical Pastel Dream
description: A magical watercolor pastel cake featuring hand-crafted fondant clouds and stars. Perfect to make any birthday celebration feel like a fairy tale.

name: Rose Gold Cupcake Box
description: A set of 6 luxury cupcakes topped with silky rose gold buttercream, edible pearls, and gold glitter. The perfect dessert gift.

name: Luxury Red Velvet Paradise
description: Classic velvet crumb layers filled with luxurious Madagascan vanilla cream cheese frosting and decorated with dried rose petals.

name: Tropical Mango Passion
description: A summer-themed mousse cake with layers of fresh Alphonso mango compote, tangy passionfruit curd, and soft sponge.
